source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter or Geist for precise English product UI, Geist Mono for codes and tabular monitoring data, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, alerts, forms, and status labels.
layout: Compact 8px-grid interfaces, 8px maximum radii, spotted dot dividers, bark-grain separators, dense dashboards, alert-first status hierarchy, restrained shadows, and high-contrast command/search surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent lanternfly wings motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #00ff00 chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create an isolated lanternfly wings motif as one complete cutout object, no surrounding environment, no text.
Subject: A single spotted lanternfly wing display with accurate insect anatomy: black head and body, elegant folded forewings in pale warm grey with dense black polka-dot pattern, vivid hindwings partially open in alert crimson red with black tips and white spots, fine legs and antennae visible, a small neutral bark-grey contact sliver may sit under the feet only if needed for natural posture. The motif should read as lanternfly wings, pattern alert system, precise and watchful.
Composition/framing: centered full subject with generous padding, three-quarter top view, wings fully visible, no cropping of antennae, legs, abdomen, wing tips, or spots.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves red, black, white, and bark-grey details; crisp silhouette edges; no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no other insects, no landscape, no branch, no leaves, no flowers, no busy bark background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow except the tiny optional bark sliver itself, no reflection, no watermark, no text.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation, copied from the session-generated image, then resized to 3840x2160 in the system folder.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lanternfly light-mode design-system board
Input image role: Use the visible transparent lanternfly wings motif from this conversation as the source reference.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Lanternfly".
Exact title text: The large page title must read exactly: Morphous Lanternfly. Spell Morphous as M-o-r-p-h-o-u-s and Lanternfly as L-a-n-t-e-r-n-f-l-y. Do not write Mornhous, Morpheus, Laternfly, or Lantern Fly.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Use a crisp design-system presentation, not a website landing page.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide when available; use large readable labels, short text, clear section titles, and avoid dense tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lanternfly, Lanternfly Wings, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Motif reference: spotted lanternfly wings on tree bark: pale grey forewings, dense black spots, white speckles, vivid crimson hindwing panels, charcoal wing tips, bark-grey tree texture, repeated warning pattern. The system mood is pattern alert system.
UI coverage: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, monitoring dashboard metric cards, risk trend chart, incident/event timeline, forms, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography samples such as 監視, 検知, 警告, 設定. Pair a precise grotesk sans for product UI with a compact mono for codes and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style pattern alert system; precise grid, 8px maximum radius, spotted dot dividers, bark-grain separators, red alert primary actions, black ink text, white signal highlights, bark-grey panels, compact operational density, restrained shadows.
Color palette: Signal Red #d8232a, Wing Red #b9141f, Spot Black #151515, Spot White #f8f6ee, Bark Grey #6f6961, Pale Wing #d8d2c6, Ash Surface #efebe2, Charcoal Tip #2a2927, Bark Umber #4c4037, Warning Clay #9f4938. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals.
Texture language: high-contrast polka-dot spot rhythm, bark grain, wing panel bands, small alert markers, no decorative orbs, no gradients.
Text: short readable UI labels only; exact section headings may include Palette, Type, Japanese, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Table, Command, Status, Tokens.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no radii above 8px.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation, copied from the session-generated image, then resized to 3840x2160 in the system folder.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lanternfly dark-mode design-system board
Input image roles: Use the visible transparent lanternfly wings motif as the source motif reference and the visible accepted light-mode Morphous Lanternfly board as the layout and component-language reference.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Lanternfly". It must feel like the same light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Exact title text: The large page title must read exactly: Morphous Lanternfly. Spell Morphous as M-o-r-p-h-o-u-s and Lanternfly as L-a-n-t-e-r-n-f-l-y. Do not write Mornhous, Morpheus, Laternfly, or Lantern Fly.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Use a crisp design-system presentation, not a website landing page.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide when available; use large readable labels, short text, clear section titles, and avoid dense tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lanternfly, Lanternfly Wings, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the light board's pattern alert system layout, component coverage, Japanese typography guidance, dot rhythm, bark-grain separators, 8px maximum radius, compact operational dashboard language, and lanternfly warning motif.
Dark palette translation: deep charcoal and bark umber backgrounds, card surfaces from charcoal wing tips, foreground from spot white and pale wing highlights, primary actions from signal red, destructive/critical from wing red, focus rings from warning clay, muted borders from bark grey, supporting charts from pale wing and spot black. Keep the palette motif-derived.
UI coverage: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, monitoring dashboard metric cards, risk trend chart, incident/event timeline, forms, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography samples such as 監視, 検知, 警告, 設定. Pair a precise grotesk sans for product UI with a compact mono for codes and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels.
Visual details: dark bark-grain field, charcoal panels, crisp pale labels, red active states, white spot highlights, black-and-white dotted dividers, wing-band texture, restrained red glow only for alerts, precise shadcn/tweakcn product UI.
Color palette: Night Bark #171411, Charcoal Tip #2a2927, Deep Bark #3a3029, Bark Grey #6f6961, Spot White #f8f6ee, Pale Wing #d8d2c6, Signal Red #d8232a, Wing Red #b9141f, Warning Clay #9f4938, Spot Black #151515. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals.
Text: short readable UI labels only; exact section headings may include Palette, Type, Japanese, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Table, Command, Status, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon cyberpunk palette, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no radii above 8px.
